# AGENTS.md — saas-builder-agents-worktree

> Codex CLI (`codex review`) reads this file automatically for project context.

## Overview

AI SaaS Builder — SaaSに必要な共通機能を固定し、業務固有部分だけを生成する。

## Commands

```bash
User → Gemini (要件整理/Blueprint) → Claude (DB/API/権限/実装) → Lovable (UI) → Claude (統合) → Playwright (E2E) → Preview
npm install
cp .env.example .env.local
```
